name: certstudy-electron
description: Nutanix Certification Study Tool — Cross-platform Electron app

scripts.test: node --test tests/questionParser.test.js tests/dataValidator.test.js tests/referenceService.test.js tests/windowState.test.js tests/pdfExportService.test.js tests/blueprintService.test.js tests/labHandlers.test.js
scripts.test:watch: node --test --watch tests/questionParser.test.js tests/dataValidator.test.js tests/referenceService.test.js tests/windowState.test.js tests/pdfExportService.test.js tests/blueprintService.test.js tests/labHandlers.test.js
